summary: Iteration 12 - Full Supabase integration stabilization SUCCESSFUL. All critical features working: 1) Dashboard fetches real data from GET /api/dashboard (lifetime_miles, total_workouts, last_workout, week stats), 2) Start Workout calls POST /api/sessions/start and creates real session in DB, 3) Finish Workout calls POST /api/sessions/complete and awards Iron Miles, 4) Dashboard updates AFTER completing workout (Iron Miles increment verified: 90 → 100 miles). Full end-to-end flow tested: Generate → Ready → Start (session created) → In Progress → Finish (session completed, miles awarded) → Complete → Dashboard (shows updated data). All 4 tabs, menu, and settings working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when user_id is provided with 'TEST_' prefix (UUID validation). Works correctly when user_id is None or valid UUID.
minor.note: Not blocking - frontend doesn't pass user_id, so this only affects tests with invalid UUID format

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Dashboard fetchDashboard() calls GET /api/dashboard on tab focus via useFocusEffect
✅ Dashboard replaces hardcoded data with real API data (lifetime_miles, total_workouts, last_workout, week stats)
✅ startWorkout() calls POST /api/sessions/start with generated_workout_id, stores sessionId in state
✅ Backend GET /api/dashboard endpoint aggregates data from Supabase (iron_miles_log, workout_sessions)
✅ Backend POST /api/sessions/start creates session with status='started'
✅ Backend POST /api/sessions/complete marks session completed, awards Iron Miles, logs to iron_miles_log
✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView)
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes
✅ Proper async/await usage in API calls
✅ useFocusEffect hook ensures dashboard refetches on tab focus
FIXED: Line 204 in index.tsx changed from driverData.targetMile to targetMile (prop reference)

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed, 1 skipped due to UUID validation)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing Supabase data. Current state: 100 Iron Miles, multiple completed workouts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 fully functional with complete Supabase integration. Dashboard now fetches real data from GET /api/dashboard (not hardcoded). Full workout flow working: Generate → Ready → Start (POST /api/sessions/start creates session) → In Progress → Finish (POST /api/sessions/complete awards miles) → Complete → Dashboard (shows updated Iron Miles). Verified dashboard updates after workout completion (90 → 100 miles). All previous features (4 tabs, menu, settings, fuel tab) remain functional. Backend tests: 11/12 passed (92%). Frontend tests: 100% pass. No critical issues found.
